title: Nebius Group (NBIS) Secures $775 Million In Debt To Expand Its AI Cloud
summary: Nebius Group secured $775 million in senior secured debt backed by GPU assets and contracted revenue. The financing marks NasdaqGS:NBIS's first major asset-backed deal to support its global AI cloud expansion. Key customers linked to the underlying contracts include large technology partners such as Microsoft and Meta.
